text:
algorithm change is a big part of it.  radically changes what kind of content gets "discovered" and fed to other people.  

2019-22 discovery was driven by likes and retweets within a cluster of accounts with similar interests (Bitcoin).  fresh Bitcoin analysis, passion, humor did great

now it's totally different.  for example, analysis threads do TERRIBLE now.  so I don't bother
